subject: fix(theme): make MapErrorBoundary reactive to theme changes
body:
Extract fallback UI into a functional MapFallback component that uses
useTheme() hook. The class-based error boundary (required by React)
now renders this functional component, so fallback colors update
correctly when the user switches themes.

Previously, MapErrorBoundary used a static THEME_HEX lookup with
Appearance.getColorScheme() — it read colors once and never updated.

Tags: theme, map, error-boundary
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
